name: Zivo Bioscience, Inc.
summary: PART I . Unless we state otherwise or the context otherwise requires, references in this Annual Report on Form 10-K to we, our, us, ZIVO, the Registrant or the Company refer to Zivo Bioscience, Inc., a Nevada corporation, and its subsidiaries.
